name: generate_text
description: Generate text continuations from a prompt using open-source language models. This is the raw text generation endpoint for non-chat use cases like code completion, creative writing, and text summarization.

parameters.name: model_id
parameters.description: The model repository ID in 'org/model' format.

parameters.name: inputs
parameters.description: The text prompt to generate continuations for.

parameters.name: parameters
parameters.description: Generation parameters including max_new_tokens, temperature, top_p, top_k, repetition_penalty.

body.inputs: The future of artificial intelligence is

body.generated_text: The future of artificial intelligence is promising, with advancements in natural language processing, computer vision, and robotics driving innovation across industries.
